Reviews Contact

About Orta Metalworks LLC

12+ years serving Tucson and surrounding areas

Orta Metalworks LLC was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide Tucson and surrounding communities with superior fencing solutions. What started as a small operation has grown into a trusted name, synonymous with quality and reliability.

We approach every project with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that each fence is not only aesthetically pleasing but also structurally sound. Our team is dedicated to exceeding expectations, from initial consultation to final installation.

We're proud to be a part of the Tucson community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. Our commitment extends beyond building fences; it's about building relationships and contributing to the well-being of our neighbors.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Orta Metalworks LLC

Trusted fence contractor professionals serving Tucson, AZ and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
